summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO | FALCON | Language change does not update FW on Charge Case
scenario: Charge Case firmware not updated after language-triggered DFU on Voyager Legend 50 in Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: When a language change triggers a firmware update on a Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset paired with the Poly Studio Mobile app, the Charge Case is not updated along with the headset. The Charge Case remains on outdated firmware after the DFU completes.
